title: The Fire Patrol

plot: In the midst of a romantic entanglement between Colin and Molly Thatcher, Capt. John Ferguson, blinded and cast adrift from his wife by sea pirate "Butch" Anderson 18 years earlier, miraculously stumbles on the villain when he is ...
